_comment: Merged model defaults. rollout_mode=MANIFOLD (measured: lagrangian->manifold lifted test energy R2 0.56->0.775, val 0.75->0.96, latent R2 0.83->0.93, BENZENE +0.76; 2026-06-12). latent_dim=16: overnight E8/E9 showed k=16 sits AT the omega_Z kNN ceiling (R2~0.84) where k=8 is information-limited. PHYSICS TERMS (new, conservative small weights). PILOT A/B 2026-06-19 (directional, k=16, 20ep & 100ep): atom_projection (constant null-space conservation projector) cut the predicted atom residual 0.53->0.235 with rate R2 unchanged; realizability cut predicted violations -12%; transport mu/k R2 reached 0.82/0.88; rate-derived energy R2 0.855 vs distilled-head 0.69 at 100ep (validates the C rate-tied energy). keq_weight=0.0 (OFF): the C2H6<->C2H4+H2 extent diagnostic showed the near-equilibrium extent is ALREADY learned without it and the penalty OVER-suppressed it (pred 0.55-0.69 vs true 0.83) - machinery kept, default off. omega_Z still needs the full HPC run to clear the floor (k=16 lever). Re-ablate on the regenerated DB. spectral_norm off, consistency 0.02, sigma_floor 1e-10, head_finetune 40 measured. Certification on the front-adaptive test set; gate retiring the distilled-head energy fallback on re-scoring the C rate-derived recompute against the §5 integral gate.
